properties.name: spring.rabbitmq.stomp.username
properties.description: Username used by the WebSocket STOMP broker relay client.

properties.name: spring.rabbitmq.stomp.password
properties.description: Password used by the WebSocket STOMP broker relay client.

properties.name: spring.rabbitmq.stomp.port
properties.description: STOMP broker relay port used by the WebSocket broker relay configuration.
